title: Performance Manager (f/m/d)
required_skills: Degree in business, management, logistics or related field
5-7 years experience in performance management, operations or analytics
Strong analytical skills with data-driven mindset
Experience with data analysis tools and performance reporting
bonus_skills: KPI definition and continuous improvement methodology
core_responsibilities: Own and drive improvements to lead times and on-time delivery performance
Define and manage KPI targets aligned with business goals
Monitor performance, analyse data, identify root causes
Develop new KPIs, automate reporting, build Power BI dashboards
recommended_emphasis: Lead with Power BI (PL-300) certification — explicit match
Highlight KPI framework design and performance monitoring from HSBC and VfB Stuttgart
Frame Hapag-Lloyd data quality and sprint tracking as operations performance analogue
Acknowledge logistics industry gap; position as analytical generalist who learns quickly
English C1 is an explicit match
